testcase.name: run_TC_001

testcase.name: run_TC_001_Negative

failure.message: Method public void testcase.TC_001.run_TC_001_Negative(java.util.HashMap) throws java.lang.InterruptedException requires a @DataProvider named : NegativeLogindata
